name: neo4j-agent-memory
description: Persistent graph memory for Claude with three memory types (short-term, long-term, reasoning), POLE+O entity extraction, and knowledge graph backed by Neo4j.
author: Neo4j Labs

core.description: Essential read/write cycle: search, context, store message, add entity/preference/fact

extended.description: Full surface including reasoning traces, entity management, graph export, and Cypher queries
